creator: gabor@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->open

Sorry for not being more explicit, it's HEAD, of course. BSD sort has been 
committed recently but it is not the default sort at the moment. By setting 
WITH_BSD_SORT=yes it can be set to default and this is what we would like to 
test to see if ports compile fine with it. If so, we will change the default 
to BSD sort.
